name: Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae
desc: The chest of Georios, the body of the fallen dragon supporting the shattered earth, enduring millennia of pain.\nDan Heng, the Nameless and the Chrysos Heir who guards the Earth's Coreflame, steadies the world before it falls and guides all life across the land to a new home beyond.\nRivers flow to the sea, mountains echo in harmony, and the eternal path stretches ten thousand miles.

1.name: Shed Scales of Old
1.desc: When Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae uses Ultimate, recovers <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s) and increases the "Bondmate's" All-Type <u>RES PEN</u> by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

2.name: Watch Trails to Blaze
2.desc: Additionally increases the number of actions for the enhanced Souldragon from Ultimate by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>. After Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae uses Ultimate, Souldragon <u>advances action</u> by <unbreak>100%</unbreak>. When the enhanced "Souldragon" takes action, the <u>Additional DMG</u> dealt by the "Bondmate" becomes <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of its original DMG, and the Shield Effect provided in this instance becomes <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of its original Shield Effect.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

3.name: Bear Weight of Worlds
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: By Oath, This Vessel Is I
4.desc: Reduces the DMG taken by the "Bondmate" by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

5.name: The Path of Permanence Sweeps Far
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: One Dream to Enfold All Wilds
6.desc: When the "Bondmate" is on the field, increases the DMG taken by all enemies by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When the "Bondmate" deals DMG, ignores <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of the enemy targets' DEF. When Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae uses Ultimate, the "Bondmate" will deal <u>Additional DMG</u> of the Bondmate's Type to all enemies, equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the Bondmate's ATK.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

141401.name: Aegis Vitae
141401.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's ATK to one designated enemy.
141401.simple_desc: Deals minor Physical DMG to one designated enemy.

141402.name: Terra Omnibus
141402.desc: Designates one ally character as the "Bondmate" and provides all allies with a Shield that can offset DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's ATK plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). When repeatedly receiving Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's Shield, can stack the Shield Effect, but it will not exceed <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of the current Shield provided by Skill.\n"Bondmate" only applies to the most recent target of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's Skill.
141402.simple_desc: Designates one ally character as the "Bondmate" and grants all allies a Shield with <color=#f29e38ff>stackable Shield Effect</color>.

141403.name: A Dragon's Zenith Knows No Rue
141403.desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's ATK to all enemies, and provides a Shield to all allies that can offset DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's ATK plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> turn(s). When repeatedly receiving Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's Shield, can stack the Shield Effect, but it will not exceed <unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak> of the current Shield provided by Skill.\n"Souldragon" becomes enhanced. When "Souldragon" takes action, launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, dealing Physical DMG to all enemies equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's ATK and <u>Additional DMG</u> of the Bondmate's Type to all enemies equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[f1]%</unbreak></color> of the Bondmate's ATK. The enhancement lasts for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> "Souldragon" action(s).
141403.simple_desc: Deals massive Physical DMG to all enemies and provides a Shield with <color=#f29e38ff>stackable Shield Effect</color> to all allies. Enhances "Souldragon." When "Souldragon" takes action, launches <color=#f29e38ff><u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color>, dealing minor Physical DMG and minor DMG of the Bondmate's Type to all enemies. The enhancement lasts for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> "Souldragon" action(s).

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

141404.name: Of Virtue, Forms Unfold
141404.desc: When an ally character becomes the "Bondmate," Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae summons "Souldragon" for them, which has an initial SPD of <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>.\nWhen "Souldragon" takes action, dispels <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> <u>debuff(s)</u> from all allies and provides a Shield that can offset DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's ATK plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). The Shield Effect provided by Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae and "Souldragon" can be stacked, but it will not exceed <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of the Shield provided by Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's Skill.\nWhen Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae or the "Bondmate" is <u>knocked down</u>, "Souldragon" disappears.
141404.simple_desc: When an ally character becomes the "Bondmate," Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae will <color=#f29e38ff>summon "Souldragon" for them</color>.\nWhen "Souldragon" takes action, dispels 1 <u>debuff</u> from all allies and provides a Shield <color=#f29e38ff>with stackable Shield Effect</color>.

10000007.name: Downed State
10000007.desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

141406.name: Attack
141406.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

141407.name: Earthrend
141407.desc: After using Technique, gains "Bondmate" and inflict Daze on enemies within a certain area for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s). Dazed enemies will not actively attack ally targets.\nWhen switching the active character, "Bondmate" transfers to the current active character. At the start of the next battle, automatically uses Skill 1 time on the character with "Bondmate" without consuming any Skill Points.
141407.simple_desc: Inflicts Daze on enemies within a certain area and grants "Bondmate" to the current active character. At the start of the next battle, automatically uses Skill on the character with "Bondmate."

1.point_desc: When using Skill, increases ATK for the target who has become "Bondmate" by an amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's ATK.

When combat starts, Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae <u>advances action</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When the "Bondmate" uses an attack, Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae regenerates <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Energy and "Souldragon" <u>advances action</u> by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

1.point_desc: When "Souldragon" takes action, additionally provides a Shield that can offset DMG equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's ATK plus <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> to the ally target whose current Shield Effect is the lowest. When repeatedly receiving Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's Shield, can stack the Shield Effect, but it will not exceed <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of the current Shield provided by Skill. When the enhanced "Souldragon" takes action, additionally deals 1 instance of <u>Additional DMG</u> of the Bondmate's Type to the one enemy target whose current HP is the highest, equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the Bondmate's ATK.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.
